subcodes.first_line: O servant of Bahá! We have named thee with this name at this hour that thou mayest glory in that which the Tongue of Grandeur hath moved to utterance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا عبد البهاء و سمیناک بهذا الاسم فی هذا الحین لتفتخر بما تحرک به لسان العظمه
subcodes.subjects: @service to others; to the Cause of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @naming of children; of individuals, @rejection by the people of the Bayan
